prTitle: feat: configure Tailwind CSS for what-s-the-temp project
prBody:
## Summary

- Scaffolds the `what-s-the-temp/` Vite + React 18 + TypeScript sub-project following the monorepo pattern from `costa-vs-starbucks/`
- Configures Tailwind CSS v3 with `tailwind.config.ts` (custom temperature colour palette), `postcss.config.js`, and `@tailwind` directives in `src/index.css`
- Verifies TypeScript compilation passes (`tsc --noEmit`) and production build succeeds (`npm run build`), producing a 5.75 kB purged CSS bundle

Closes #353
